name: Feature request

---

## Problem this solves

What problem does this feature address? Who experiences it?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature. Include example command output or API if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches have you thought about?

## Would you like to work on this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this
- [ ] I'd like guidance before starting
- [ ] I'm suggesting it for someone else to pick up
